tooltip.occultism_relics_bridge.demon_st:
"I, %1$s, forge this power! Dare not alter my work, mortal.
 If you are unpleased summon a greater demon ...if you dare!"
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.2: Too tight... this relic is too tight...
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.5: My power is limitless, use it wisely.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.8: Blood for the blood... wait, wrong franchise.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.9: Do not presume to command %1$s forever.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.10: I was a king once. Now I am a bauble.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.11: Tap the glass again, %2$s, see what happens.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.12: The abyss stares back, and it's bored.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.15: I know what you did in the dark, %2$s.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.16: Your time is running out, mortal.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.17: Let us paint this world red.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.18: I grant you power, but at what cost?
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.19: Can you feel the shadows creeping closer?
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.20: Do you ever wonder if you are the monster?
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.21: I am %1$s, the whisper in the dark.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.22: Such frail, fragile bones you have.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.23: One day, I will be the one holding you.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.26: Even demons get claustrophobia, you know.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.29: Is it dark in here, or is it just my soul?
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.30: They will all bow to %1$s eventually.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.32: I'm not trapped in here with you. You're trapped out there with me.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.35: I taste copper in the air.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.36: I remember the dimension of fire. I miss it.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.38: Are you going to stare at this screen all day?
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.39: I could have been a sword. Why am I a trinket?
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.40: Close your eyes. Listen to the void.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.41: Every time you use my power, I take a piece of your soul.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.42: I was summoned for this? Really?
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.43: The stars align, %2$s. Do you see them?
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.44: You are just a vessel, just like this relic.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.45: My true name is unpronounceable by your tongue.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.48: We are bound by magic, not loyalty.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.49: I demand a sacrifice! Or maybe a cookie.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.51: Don't put me in a chest, %2$s. Please.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.53: Do you feel powerful, %2$s? You are nothing without me.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.54: The magic of this world tastes stale.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.55: I am eternal. You have like... 80 years left.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.56: Look closer. Let me see your eyes.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.58: Just one drop of blood to break the seal...
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.59: I am %1$s, destroyer of worlds... stuck in your pocket.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.60: If I had hands, I would strangle you.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.63: I see the strings pulling you, %2$s.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.64: Your greed will be your downfall.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.65: Power is a heavy burden. Let me carry it.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.66: I once devoured a star. Now I boost your stats.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.69: My pentacle was cozier than this.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.72: I can smell the gold in your inventory.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.73: There is no light where I come from.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.74: I am the nightmare you can't wake up from.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.76: What is the meaning of this blocky existence?
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.77: Let my power surge through your veins.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.79: To bind %1$s is a sin you will pay for.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.80: They whisper my name in fear.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.81: Wash your hands before you touch me.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.82: Can you feel the chill? That's me.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.83: I see the way they look at you.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.84: Do you like hurting other people?
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.86: I am an ancient evil, not your pet.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.87: The end is closer than you think, %2$s.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.88: Your fragile mind could not comprehend my true form.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.89: I remember the dark before the light.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.90: Every soul you reap belongs to me.
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.92: Have you lost your mind yet?
occultism_relics_bridge.rambling.95: Make a wish. I dare you.
book.occultism_relics_bridge.dictionary_: Relics can no longer be found naturally. Instead, you will find Relic Parts in dungeons. You can also crush unwanted Relics using a Foliot Crusher to obtain more parts. These parts can be crafted into unawakened Zodiac Artifacts.

To breathe life into an artifact, you must perform a ritual. Place the unawakened artifact on the pentacle and sacrifice a bound book to bind a demon to it. The following pages show the three rituals using the Aries artifact as an example.

The ensuing Relic mirrors the very essence of its captive: as the might of the subjugated demon grows, from a flickering Foliot to an unfathomable Marid, so too do the formidable powers dormant within the artifact.

Zodiac Artifacts possess the profound potential to be awakened. The physical manifestation of the forged artifact is entirely bound to its guiding constellation. Each Zodiac Artifact conceals its own unique lineage of forms—distinct shapes that a seasoned summoner will effortlessly recognize.
